repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Correspondence, minutes, articles, records, lecture notes, exams, manuscripts, research material.
did.abstract: Professional papers of Adrian M. Srb, geneticist and professor of plant breeding at Cornell.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Adrian Srb earned a bachelor's degree in English literature and a master's degree in agronomy from the University of Nebraska. He then earned a doctorate in biology in 1937 from Stanford University, where he taught until coming to Cornell in 1947 as an associate professor of plant breeding. He wrote numerous articles and papers on the genetics, physiology, and development of fungi, including the bread mold Neurospora and baker's yeast. At Cornell, he taught General Genetics, and authored the textbook General Genetics. He was elected to the American Academy of Arts and Sciences in 1941, and to the National Academy of Sciences in 1968. Born in 1917, Adrian Srb died in 1997.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Professional papers include correspondence with colleagues and students; class and course notes for general genetics and human genetics courses; research materials, including notes and charts relating to Neurospora; files relating to professional organizations, seminars, and conferences; files relating to activities at Cornell, particularly the creation of the Division of Biological Sciences; grant applications; and manuscripts for books.

emph.ref: Series III. Symposia, Seminars, Committee Material
Series IV. Projects and Subject Files

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Adrian M. Srb papers, #21-28-3159. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

Genetics.

Cornell University. Division of Biological Sciences

did.unittitle: Evolution of manuscripts and research proposals

American Academy of Arts and Sciences
Committee on Systematics, Evolution, and Environmental Biology
Subcommittee on preliminary definitions of new positions to be created in biology
Committee on Recruitment to the Division of Biology
Executive Committee- Division of Biological Sciences
Ad Hoc Committees- Appointments and tenure
General Committee of the Graduate School
National Institutes of Health- Training Committee
Search Committee for Director- Biological Sciences
Search Committee for Dean- College of Agriculture and Life Sciences

Book collection contest (Arthur H. Dean and Mary Marden Dean)
National Science Foundation- Undergraduate teaching proposal

National Institutes of Health (Genetics Training Committee Award)
National Institute of General Medical Sciences- National Institutes of Health
75th Anniversary of the Department of Plant Breeding- synopsis, symposium, invitations
College of Arts and Sciences- membership
Section of Genetics, Development, and Physiology- correspondences

Genes and the Chemistry of the Organism by G.w. Beadle
National Academy of Sciences, Nominating Committee
National Institues of Health on Graduate Training and Genetics Training

Paper for Plant Physiology- implications of genetics for growth and development

"Genes and Metabolic Pathways" (paper)- Harper & Row, publishers
"Mutation and Selection in Fungi"- paper written by Srb
Random published articles written by Srb
Resolutions- Lowell F. Randolph's retirement and death
Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences- unsorted correspondence

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The rest of this box contains miscellaneous notebooks consisting of charts, graphs, diagrams and observations Srb made during his years of research.
